footer.description: Advanced crop disease detection using cutting-edge technology to help farmers protect their crops and maximize yields.

home.heroDescription: Advanced disease detection for corn crops. Upload a leaf image and get instant diagnosis with treatment recommendations.
home.uploadImageDesc: Take a clear photo of your corn leaf and upload it to our platform
home.aiAnalysisDesc: Our advanced system validates the image and analyzes it to detect diseases
home.getResultsDesc: Receive detailed diagnosis with symptoms and treatment recommendations
home.cornDetectionDesc: Our AI can detect the following corn diseases with high accuracy
home.commonRustDesc: Small circular to elongate reddish-brown pustules appearing on both leaf surfaces
home.grayLeafSpotDesc: Rectangular gray to tan lesions parallel to leaf veins that can cover entire leaves
home.northernLeafBlightDesc: Long cigar-shaped gray-green lesions that turn tan or brown with reduced photosynthesis
home.readyTitle: Ready to Protect Your Corn Crops?
home.readyDesc: Start detecting corn diseases today and get expert recommendations

detect.subtitle: Upload a photo of your corn leaf to detect diseases instantly
detect.bannerDesc: Our AI can detect Common Rust, Gray Leaf Spot, and Northern Leaf Blight in corn leaves. Please upload a clear image of a corn leaf for accurate results.

results.noResultsDesc: Please upload an image first to detect diseases
results.title: Detection Results
results.importantDesc: This is a preliminary diagnosis based on image analysis. For critical cases or confirmation, please consult with a certified agricultural expert or your local extension officer. Early intervention is key to managing crop diseases effectively.
results.greatNewsDesc: Your crop appears to be healthy. Continue following good agricultural practices and regular monitoring to maintain crop health.

awareness.title: Corn Disease Awareness & Education
awareness.subtitle: Learn about corn diseases, prevention methods, and best practices for healthy crops
awareness.ctaDesc: Use our AI-powered detection tool to identify corn diseases early

preventionTips: Plant disease-resistant corn varieties whenever possible.
Use crop rotation and avoid growing corn in the same field repeatedly.
Maintain proper field sanitation by removing infected plant debris.
Monitor fields regularly and act early at first sign of disease.
bestPractices: Use balanced fertilization and avoid excessive nitrogen.
Maintain proper spacing for airflow between plants.
Irrigate in the morning to reduce prolonged leaf wetness.
Consult local extension services for region-specific guidance.

faqs.question: How accurate is AgroCare disease detection?
faqs.answer: AgroCare provides high-confidence predictions, but for severe cases you should verify with an agricultural expert.

faqs.question: Can I use any photo for detection?
faqs.answer: Use a clear, well-lit close-up image of a corn leaf for best results.

faqs.question: What should I do after detection?
faqs.answer: Follow the treatment guidance and monitor your field. If symptoms spread quickly, seek professional advice.

imageUploader.disclaimerDistance: Take the photo from 5 inches away.

predictionCard.info: For accurate diagnosis and treatment, consult with a local agricultural expert or extension officer.
